'''Steve Rosolen''' (born 16 December 1966) is an Australian former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played as a {{rlp|sr}} forward for [[Norths Devils|Brisbane Norths]] in the [[Brisbane Rugby League premiership]], as well as the [[London Crusaders]] in the second division and their later incarnation as the [[London Broncos]] in the [[Super League (Europe)|European Super League]]. He also played for the [[North Sydney Bears]] in their 1991 Reserve Grade Grand Final.<ref name="From Fulham to Wembley">{{cite book|last1=Farrar|first1=Dave|last2=Lush|first2=Peter|title=From Fulham to Wembley|date=2000|publisher=London League Publications|location=London|isbn=978-0952606444}}</ref><ref name="Touch and Go: A History of Professional Rugby League in London">{{cite book|last1=Farrar|first1=Dave|last2=Lush|first2=Peter|title=Touch and Go: A History of Professional Rugby League in London|date=1995|publisher=London League Publications|location=London|isbn=978-0952606406}}</ref>

He first came to England on trial, but broke his arm 50 minutes into his first game for [[Salford Red Devils|Salford]].<ref name="Touch and Go: A History of Professional Rugby League in London"/>

For many years his 171 games played for the [[London Broncos|London]] club was a record.<ref name="Fulham">{{cite web|url=http://www.greyhoundderby.com/Fulham%20RL.htm|title=Fulham|publisher=Greyhound Derby|date=|access-date=9 March 2021}}</ref><ref name="Retchless renews Broncos deal">{{cite web|url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/sport2/hi/rugby_league/super_league/2231314.stm|title=Retchless renews Broncos deal|publisher=BBC|date=2 September 2002|access-date=9 March 2021}}</ref><ref name="Bradford prove too strong for Broncos">{{cite web|url=https://www.thetimes.com/article/bradford-prove-too-strong-for-broncos-nv8hz26rz8s|title=Bradford prove too strong for Broncos|publisher=[[The Times]]|date=1 September 2003|access-date=9 March 2021}}</ref><ref name="Retchless left wretched by Bulls">{{cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2003/sep/01/rugbyleague.bradfordbulls|title=Retchless left wretched by Bulls|publisher=The Guardian|date=1 September 2003|access-date=9 March 2021}}</ref>
